evidence_summary: Reviewed both completed children (POL-541: extractSummary bugfix in src/loop/adapters/terminal-cli.ts hardening JSON-object detection for worker stdout parsing, plus a regression test; POL-499: run-archive telemetry/map copy in src/finalize/steps/12-archive.ts, new promoted-run-archive/legacy-run-artifact classification in artifact-policy.ts, .gitignore updates, and doc updates the worker already made inline to docs/USAGE.md, smartdocs/architecture/polaris-run-ledger.md, smartdocs/architecture/runtime-state-consolidation-spec.md, and src/finalize/steps/POLARIS.md). Cross-checked all 7 affected-folder POLARIS.md and SUMMARY.md files against actual folder state: all remain factually accurate — POL-541's change is an internal bugfix that doesn't alter documented responsibilities, and POL-499's worker commit already updated src/finalize/steps/POLARIS.md with the new archive behavior. No stale, missing, or contradicted statements found. No smartdocs/raw candidates, cognition notes, or pending archival items were associated with this cluster. No documentation writes were needed, so no librarian commit was made (commit_sha: null). No blockers.
